title: Business Intelligence Analyst

rationales.taskAutomation: Standard dashboard builds, recurring KPI reports, and routine SQL extraction make up most of the role's core output, and AI now produces that directly.
rationales.toolMaturity: BI copilots (Power BI Copilot, Looker AI) are mature and widely shipped inside standard enterprise BI stacks.
rationales.adoption: AI-assisted BI reporting is now a mainstream expectation across large and mid-market firms.
rationales.agenticExposure: Dashboard refresh and recurring report maintenance are agent-ownable pipelines with minimal human review needed.

tasksAtRisk: Building and maintaining recurring KPI dashboards
Standard SQL data extraction and reporting
tasksGrowing: Defining new metrics for ambiguous business questions
Cross-functional stakeholder alignment on what to measure
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 15-1211 (Computer Systems Analysts, closest BI-analyst mapping), p25-p75

defenseSkills.skill: Directing AI BI Copilots (Power BI, Looker)

insight: AI BI copilots now build and refresh most recurring dashboards without an analyst touching the query. The role's future is in deciding what should be measured in the first place and chasing down why a metric moved, not in maintaining the pipeline that reports it.
